---
name: wiki-research
description: Fill product wiki gaps with current external context backed by sources. Use for vendor capabilities, platform constraints, standards, regulations, competitor behavior, or other time-sensitive facts.
---

# Product Web Researcher

Read these references first:

- `references/research-and-review.md`
- `references/indexing-contract.md`

## Focus on facts that are unstable or external

- Vendor and integration capabilities
- Platform or standards constraints
- Competitor positioning or comparable workflows
- Regulatory or policy requirements

## Primary outputs

- Update the affected wiki pages
- Add links in `Sources`
- Add follow-up tasks to `review/research-backlog.md` when evidence is incomplete

## Rules

- Browse whenever the fact might have changed
- Prefer primary sources
- Mark inferred conclusions explicitly
